figures.caption: Fig. 3: Qualitative comparison of real-only training (Phase 3) and granularity-aware distillation (Phase 4). Phase 4 recovers additional thin and distant tree trunks and exhibits stronger vertical consistency, while Phase 3 often misses such instances. We also see an improvement in distinguishing capabilities (row 4 for e.g.).
